scenes.voice_text: Hey there! Welcome to GluMira — your friendly insulin helper. Let me show you something cool.

scenes.visual_note: A colourful curve grows like a wave
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin works like a wave — it goes up, then slowly comes down.
scenes.voice_text: Your insulin works like a wave. It goes up when it's working hardest, then slowly comes back down.

scenes.visual_note: Colourful blocks stack like building blocks
scenes.subtitle_text: When waves overlap, they get bigger. That's called stacking!
scenes.voice_text: When two waves overlap, they get bigger. That's called stacking — and GluMira shows you when it happens!

scenes.visual_note: A glowing shield protects the data
scenes.subtitle_text: Your data is safe and private. Only you and your team can see it.
scenes.voice_text: Don't worry — your data is super safe. Only you, your parents, and your doctor can see it.

scenes.subtitle_text: Awesome! Let's set up your profile.
scenes.voice_text: Awesome! Let's set up your profile and start exploring. It's going to be great!
